title: Automation of mirrored columns
excerpt: The ability to make an automation on a board in which another boards column is mirrored, using the mirror in the automation, would be incredibly helpful.  For example, if the status that is mirrored changes on the parent…

posts.author: MandyJ (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
The ability to make an automation on a board in which another boards column is mirrored, using the mirror in the automation, would be incredibly helpful. For example, if the status that is mirrored changes on the parent board, the mirror column on the other board would trigger an automation with its change.

This would be helpful since we have multiple teams involved with every item and one teams work start depends on another teams work completion.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can set up an automation where a change in status on one board triggers an update on another board.
You can mirror the status column from the other board and then use that mirrored column to trigger an automation when its value changes

Cheers,
Harsh

posts.author: kirst (Kirst)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same request, expect for any mirrored column type! The automation that Fario Consulting recommended doesn’t work for me because the mirrored column I want to use isn’t a Status Column, it’s a Number Column.
